task_updates.executor_notes: Audit-only batch; no source edits required. Verified `_classify_confirmation` has one production caller at `src/features/admin_chat/admin_chat_cog.py:1022` and test-only direct callers at `tests/test_admin_payments.py:600,606,607`. Verified `self._classifier_client` is initialized at `src/features/admin_chat/admin_chat_cog.py:65` and has zero current readers anywhere else in the repo. Verified admin-chat-local `_can_user_message_bot`, `_is_directed_at_bot`, `MEMBER_SYSTEM_PROMPT`, `MEMBER_TOOLS`, `ADMIN_ONLY_TOOLS`, `get_tools_for_role`, `MEMBER_MAX_CONVERSATION_LENGTH`, and the `is_admin` plumbing are only referenced inside `src/features/admin_chat/` plus `tests/test_admin_payments.py` and `tests/test_social_route_tools.py`. Separately verified `src/features/admin/admin_cog.py:211,363` contains a different live `_can_user_message_bot` used for DM routing and it remains out of scope.

sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: Confirmed. No live readers were found outside `src/features/admin_chat/` and the flagged tests for `self._classifier_client`, the admin-chat-local `_can_user_message_bot` / `_is_directed_at_bot`, `MEMBER_SYSTEM_PROMPT`, `MEMBER_TOOLS`, `ADMIN_ONLY_TOOLS`, `get_tools_for_role`, `MEMBER_MAX_CONVERSATION_LENGTH`, or the `is_admin` parameter plumbing. The only same-name `_can_user_message_bot` outside that scope is the separate live helper in `src/features/admin/admin_cog.py:211`, called from its DM listener at `src/features/admin/admin_cog.py:363`, and it is preserved.
